untranslatable_reason: This signal requires option-specific indicators (implied volatility, IV spread, strike prices, expiration dates) that are not available in the allowed indicator list. The allowed indicators are designed for price-based technical analysis on single assets, not multi-leg option strategies. Translating this requires: (1) implied volatility data for multiple options on the same underlying, (2) strike price comparisons, (3) expiration matching logic, and (4) IV ratio calculations—none of which can be expressed using the available price, moving average, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, or volume indicators.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_62_0 is a volatility spread strategy that operates in the options market space. It requires real-time IV term structures and multi-leg option chain data. This cannot be backtested using the standard OHLCV indicators provided. Consider implementing a separate options-specific backtest engine with IV surface data.
